CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $700.00 FILED BY BIALKIN DONALD A AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT CHIU KEVIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-14-1993 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 01
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CHIU KEVIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BIALKIN DONALD A $2,970.50 PRINCIPAL, $20.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,990.50, PLFT WAS 35% NEGLIGENT, AWARD REDUCED ACCORDINGLY. PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CERT. RECEIPT TO KEVIN CHIU RETURNED SIGNED.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT BIALKIN DONALD A
